description: Create the branding/ folder with complete brand guidelines, copy guide, and reusable CSS assets
steps: Create branding/BRAND_GUIDE.md with complete brand guidelines: logo concept (Nu in modern sans-serif with violet gradient dot), color palette (Primary #7c3aed violet, Secondary #06b6d4 cyan, Accent #f59e0b amber, Success #10b981, Error #ef4444, Neutral grays), typography (Inter for UI, JetBrains Mono for code), voice and tone guidelines, icon style (Lucide icons outlined consistent weight), component patterns (rounded corners, subtle shadows, glass-morphism cards), dark/light mode guidelines, spacing scale, and do's and don'ts sections

Create branding/COPY_GUIDE.md with marketing copy: 3-5 tagline options, elevator pitch paragraph, short punchy feature descriptions, social media templates, email templates (welcome and onboarding), Product Hunt description, and comparison hooks vs HubSpot/Pipedrive/Zoho
Create branding/assets/colors.css with CSS custom properties for all brand colors organized by category (primary, secondary, accent, semantic, neutrals) for both light and dark modes

Create branding/assets/animations.css with reusable CSS keyframe animations: fade-in, slide-up, float, pulse-glow, gradient-shift, typing-cursor, scale-hover, parallax-float, orbit, shimmer-glow - all self-contained and importable
acceptance_criteria: branding/BRAND_GUIDE.md exists with all sections (logo, colors, typography, voice, icons, components, dark/light, spacing, do's and don'ts)
branding/COPY_GUIDE.md exists with all marketing copy sections
branding/assets/colors.css exists with CSS custom properties
branding/assets/animations.css exists with at least 5 reusable keyframe animations
verification: Run ls branding/ and ls branding/assets/ to confirm files exist
Run wc -l branding/BRAND_GUIDE.md branding/COPY_GUIDE.md to confirm substantial content
findings: Created all 4 branding files. BRAND_GUIDE.md: 374 lines, COPY_GUIDE.md: 318 lines, colors.css: 192 lines, animations.css: 254 lines. Total 1138 lines. TypeScript build passes cleanly.
